description: Create a STRIDE threat model diagram for a mobile banking application in '~/Diagrams/threat_model.drawio' based on the architecture specification in '~/Desktop/mobile_banking_architecture.txt'. The diagram must include a Data Flow Diagram visualizing the specified External Entities, Processes, Data Stores, Data Flows, and Trust Boundaries, annotated with the 6 STRIDE threats from the specification. Include a second page named 'Threat Summary' containing a list or table of these threats. Export the completed diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/threat_model.pdf'.
